rationale: The cited paper is used for a concrete analytical role, not just background listing. In Experiment 4, the authors explicitly state they run "2 x continuous floodlight analyses (Spiller et al. 2013)" to probe the interaction between video speed and absorption tendency and determine regions where effects are significant. This method is part of their hypothesis testing workflow, so the citation function is methodological application.
relation_description: The citing paper applies Spiller et al. (2013)'s floodlight/simple-effects probing approach to test and interpret a moderated effect. Specifically, it uses floodlight analysis to identify the absorption-tendency range where slow motion significantly changes luxury perceptions.
